title: LTW's Factory/Nuclear Tech Mod
description: This mod adds Factory and Nuclear items, blocks and more!
body:
**THIS IS A ALPHA VERSION! MOST THINGS ARE EXPECTED TO CHANGE!**

## Information

This is a mod inspired by HBM's Nuclear Tech Mod! I wont be able to add all features, but I plan to make the most that I can out of MCreator.

## Additions

**Most of the items are unabtainable in Survival Mode!** This mod currently adds new building blocks, a new set of tools, and new materials to use for future edditons. Examples of the building blocks are Concrete, Asphalt, and Asbestoes Concrete.
